codeIssues.problem: No .catch() block for failed API calls
codeIssues.impact: Loading state stuck indefinitely on error

codeIssues.problem: Invalid JSON will throw and crash component
codeIssues.impact: All offers on page fail to display
Loading state stuck, data not updated

codeIssues.problem: Debug logs expose route params to users

codeIssues.impact: Page stuck in loading state on API failure

codeIssues.problem: No cleanup if component unmounts during async operation
codeIssues.impact: Potential memory leak on page navigation
codeIssues.fix: Use effect cleanup or check component mounted state

securityVulnerabilities.cveType: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation
securityVulnerabilities.description: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) via quota HTML content
securityVulnerabilities.vulnerability:
The application renders quota content using Vue's v-html directive without sanitization:
If the /api/member.Platform/quota endpoint returns malicious HTML payload, it will be executed in the user's browser context.

securityVulnerabilities.exploitScenario:
Backend stores invalid JSON in project_params:
  project_params = '{"invalid": json syntax}'
Exception thrown → Component crashes → User cannot access any offers

securityVulnerabilities.vulnerability:
getQuota() promise has no .catch() handler. If API fails:
  getQuota({ project_pno }).then(res => { ... })
  
quotaLoading state remains true indefinitely.
securityVulnerabilities.exploitScenario:
Network error or server returns 500:
→ User sees infinite loading spinner
→ User cannot close modal or interact with page
→ Browser tab becomes potentially unresponsive

securityVulnerabilities.cveType: CWE-532: Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File
securityVulnerabilities.description: Sensitive data exposed in console logs
securityVulnerabilities.vulnerability:
console.log(route) exposes route parameters and query strings:
  - platform_id
  - user identification data
  - potential authentication tokens
securityVulnerabilities.exploitScenario:
User shares screenshot of browser console
→ Attacker gains access to routing structure
→ Information useful for further attacks
securityVulnerabilities.remediation:
Remove all console.log statements in production code.
Use proper logging library with log levels.

performanceIssues.impact: Higher memory usage, slower initial render

performanceIssues.current: Called fresh on every page load
performanceIssues.impact: Unnecessary network request, slower perceived perf
performanceIssues.recommendation: Cache response in Pinia store with 5-minute TTL

performanceIssues.issue: No lazy loading for quota modal
performanceIssues.current: Full modal component loaded even if not used
performanceIssues.recommendation: Use dynamic import for quota modal
